mission.title: minio: Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize sub-systems: Unable to migrate all config at .minio.sys/config/
mission.description: Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize sub-systems: Unable to migrate all config at .minio.sys/config/. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify minio troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your minio deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review minio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant minio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio
kubectl get configmap -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio
```
Can't start minio container with volumes 

## Expected Behavior
Run minio container with mounted directory

docker-compose.yml consist with:

```
version: "3"
services:

  minio:
    image: minio/minio
    container_name: minio
    hostname: minio

steps.title: Apply the fix for Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize…
steps.description:
Add workaround for issue preventing servers from starting on Windows Docker Engine 19.03.8
```yaml
version: "3"
services:

  minio:
    image: minio/minio
    container_name: minio
    hostname: minio
    volumes:
      - ./minio/s3:/data
    ports:
      - 9000:9000
    command: 'server /data'
    environment:
      MINIO_ACCESS_KEY: minio
      MINIO_SECRET_KEY: minio123
```

steps.title: Confirm Server startup failed with 'Unable to initialize… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n minio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Add workaround for issue preventing servers from starting on Windows Docker Engine 19.03.8

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with minio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
